title: Front Office Manager - Devyani International Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Devyani International Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Devyani International Holdings Services in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Devyani International Holdings Services:
Devyani International Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Devyani International Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
